title: Drug-Induced Acute Interstitial Nephritis
buzzwords: AKI 7-10 days after a new pill
Combined type I and type IV hypersensitivity
Offending drug acts as a hapten
Stop drug; glucocorticoids except for NSAID cases

title: Infection-Induced Acute Interstitial Nephritis
buzzwords: Rising creatinine during a systemic infection
WBC casts without an allergic drug history
Direct microbial stimulation of renal interstitium

title: Autoimmune-Induced Acute Interstitial Nephritis
buzzwords: Intrarenal AKI in a connective tissue disease patient
Sterile pyuria without recent drug exposure
Malar rash, arthritis, and WBC casts
